core_arc: Child and their pet share an experience together.

personalisation_slots.NAME: Child's first name
personalisation_slots.PET_TYPE: Type of pet — dog, cat, rabbit, hamster

scenes.outline: [NAME] had a pet called [PET_NAME]. [PET_NAME] was a [PET_TYPE]. They were best friends.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] with [PET_NAME] the [PET_TYPE], affectionate pose. Happy expressions.

scenes.outline: Today they would go to [LOCATION] together. [PET_NAME] wagged their tail.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] getting ready to go out, [PET_NAME] excited and eager.

scenes.outline: At [LOCATION], [NAME] and [PET_NAME] began to [ACTIVITY]. It was so much fun!
[PET_NAME] ran and played. [NAME] laughed. [PET_NAME] was so silly sometimes!
Then [PET_NAME] got tired. [NAME] sat down. [PET_NAME] came and sat with [NAME].
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] sitting, [PET_NAME] coming to rest beside them, peaceful moment.

scenes.outline: It was time to go home. [NAME] and [PET_NAME] walked back together.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] and [PET_NAME] walking home, side by side.

scenes.outline: At home, [PET_NAME] fell asleep. [NAME] smiled. [PET_NAME] was the best pet ever.

comprehension_questions.inference: How do you think [NAME] feels about [PET_NAME]?

writing_worksheet.level_1_2: Trace and write: p, t, d, g. Copy the word: pet.
writing_worksheet.level_3_4: Write these words from the story: pet, friend, happy. Write about a pet you know.
writing_worksheet.level_5_6: Write 2 sentences about [NAME] and [PET_NAME]. Why are pets good friends?

dinosaurs.ACTIVITY: dig in the sand like dinosaurs

space.ACTIVITY: chase a ball like a shooting star
